commands: backend: python manage.py makemigrations trading execution --check
expected_results: Open trades (close_time null) are ignored — no TradeOutcomeRecord.
A closed trade with net pnl>0 is classified WIN; net<0 LOSS; net==0 BREAKEVEN; net = profit+commission+swap.
WIN creates an internal delivery candidate ONLY (is_delivery_candidate=True, delivered=False); no WIMS ConsumptionContract is created.
LOSS/BREAKEVEN are recorded internally only (never delivery candidates); no WIMS.
A trade already recorded is never reprocessed (re-run keeps a single record) — OneToOne + IntegrityError guard.
A trade with close_time set but close_price missing fails closed (skipped, no record); one flaky trade never aborts the batch.
Signal linkage (correlation_id / signal_source / execution_job) is preserved when a matching plan exists; blank/null otherwise; the trade is still recorded.
The close-monitor references no order_send/order_check/agent_order/deliver_trade_result/ingest_winning_trade/ConsumptionContract/Telegram send; it only writes TradeOutcomeRecord.
Migrations are additive (Trade.correlation_id; TradeOutcomeRecord) with safe defaults; full backend suite green; secret-scan + governance pass.
actual_results: ClassificationTests: open ignored PASS; WIN PASS; LOSS PASS; BREAKEVEN PASS; net_pnl includes commission+swap (profit 10, commission -12 → net -2 → LOSS) PASS.
RoutingTests: WIN is internal delivery candidate only, ConsumptionContract.count()==0 PASS; LOSS/BREAKEVEN internal only, 0 candidates, 0 WIMS PASS.
IdempotencyTests: three runs → exactly 1 record PASS.
FailClosedTests: incomplete close (close_price null) skipped, 0 records PASS; flaky-linkage trade skipped, other 2 trades recorded (processed=2, skipped=1) PASS.
LinkageTests: matching plan → correlation_id+signal_source+execution_job preserved PASS; correlation_id without plan preserved (source/job blank) PASS; unlinked trade still recorded PASS.

BoundaryAndCommandTests: AST — none of order_send/order_check/agent_order/deliver_trade_result/ingest_winning_trade/ConsumptionContract/send_message/sendMessage present; no wims import; run_close_monitor command records a WIN PASS.
Full backend suite: Ran 408 tests OK (pre-hardening); close-monitor 15 OK post-hardening.
makemigrations trading execution --check: only the two additive migrations; make secret-scan OK; governance-check OK; EVIDENCE-LINT PASS.
Adversarial 3-lens boundary review: GO, no must-fix, no boundary violation; the one robustness nit (linkage outside the try) was hardened.
limitations: Repo-only — no production deploy, no provider arming, no auto-demo/live, no E3, no order_send, no Telegram notification, no WIMS publishing change, no real trade, no execution behaviour change.
No trade is created by this packet; the monitor is validated against constructed/fixture trades. It is not wired into any scheduler or live path (run manually via run_close_monitor).
Trade.correlation_id is blank today (no signal-originated real trade exists yet); a future auto-demo order-ingest is what will populate it. Linkage is therefore best-effort 'where available'.
The monitor writes only internal TradeOutcomeRecord rows; the future profit-only Telegram notification + the loss-path WIMS re-route are explicitly out of scope and unbuilt.
